untranslatable_reason: Signal requires candle color classification (Black vs White) which is not available as an explicit indicator. Body height comparison to other candles in historical context requires relative analysis not supported by single-bar indicators. Success rates and volume trends marked AUTHOR_SILENT are unmapped.
translation_notes: Translated core identifiable candlestick properties: short body (body > 0) with upper and lower shadows both shorter than body. Direction is CONTEXT_DEPENDENT per source. Exit conditions are conservative reversals since author did not specify. Color detection would require: close < open, which is not available as atomic operator.
